+- KotlinFile[]
   +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   +- PackageHeader[]
   |  +- T-PACKAGE[@Text = "package"]
   |  +- Identifier[]
   |  |  +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |  |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "net"]
   |  |  +- T-DOT[@Text = "."]
   |  |  +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |  |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "sourceforge"]
   |  |  +- T-DOT[@Text = "."]

   |  |  +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     +- T-Identifier[@Text = "testdata"]
   |  +- Semi[]

   |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]

   +- TopLevelObject[]
   |  +- Declaration[]
   |  |  +- ClassDeclaration[@Identifier = "Simple", @TypeName = "net.sourceforge.pmd.lang.kotlin.ast.testdata.Simple"]
   |  |     +- T-CLASS[@Text = "class"]
   |  |     +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "Simple"]
   |  |     +- ClassBody[]
   |  |        +- T-LCURL[@Text = "{"]

   |  |        |  |     +- PropertyDeclaration[@Mutable = false, @TypeName = "kotlin.String"]
   |  |        |  |        +- Modifiers[]

   |  |        |  |        |     +- VisibilityModifier[]
   |  |        |  |        |        +- T-PRIVATE[@Text = "private"]
   |  |        |  |        +- T-VAL[@Text = "val"]
   |  |        |  |        +- VariableDeclaration[@Identifier = "name"]
   |  |        |  |        |  +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |        |  |        |     +- T-Identifier[@Text = "name"]
   |  |        |  |        +- T-ASSIGNMENT[@Text = "="]
   |  |        |  |        +- Expression[]

   |  |        |  |        |                                                     |  +- T-LineStrText[@Text = "Simple"]
   |  |        |  |        |                                                     +- T-QUOTE_CLOSE[@Text = "\""]
   |  |        |  |        +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |        |  +- ClassMemberDeclaration[]
   |  |        |  |  +- Declaration[]
   |  |        |  |     +- FunctionDeclaration[@Identifier = "info", @ReturnTypeName = "kotlin.String"]

   |  |        |  |        +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |        |  |        |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "info"]

   |  |           |  |                                                        |                                               |     +- MemberAccessOperator[]
   |  |           |  |                                                        |                                               |     |  +- T-DOT[@Text = "."]
   |  |           |  |                                                        |                                               |     +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |           |  |                                                        |                                               |        +- T-Identifier[@Text = "info"]

   |  |           |  |                                                        |                                                  +- CallSuffix[]

   |  |           |  +- Semis[]
   |  |           |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |           +- T-RCURL[@Text = "}"]
   |  +- Semis[]
   |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   +- EOF[@Text = "<EOF>"]
